allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Select-Object -First 3 | ForEach-Object { $fields = $_ -split ";"; Write-Output "CODIGO: $\($fields[0].Trim\(\)\) | DESC_LEN: $\($fields[1].Trim\(\).Length\) | SP: $\($fields[9].Trim\(\)\) | SH: $\($fields[10].Trim\(\)\) | FIM: $\($fields[13].Trim\(\)\)" })

PowerShell($maxLen = 0; $maxLine = ""; Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | ForEach-Object { $fields = $_ -split ";"; $len = $fields[1].Trim\(\).Length; if \($len -gt $maxLen\) { $maxLen = $len; $maxLine = $fields[1].Trim\(\) } }; Write-Output "Max desc length: $maxLen | Exemplo: $maxLine")

PowerShell($active = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Where-Object { \($_ -split ";"\)[13].Trim\(\) -eq "999999" } | Measure-Object\).Count; $total = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; Write-Output "Ativos \(999999\): $active / Total: $total")

PowerShell($over63 = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Where-Object { \($_ -split ";"\)[1].Trim\(\).Length -gt 63 } | Measure-Object\).Count; $under63 = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Where-Object { \($_ -split ";"\)[1].Trim\(\).Length -le 63 } | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Output "Desc > 63 chars: $over63 | Desc <= 63 chars: $under63")

PowerShell($sp = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Where-Object { \($_ -split ";"\)[9].Trim\(\) -ne "0" } | Measure-Object\).Count; $sh = \(Get-Content "C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt" | Where-Object { \($_ -split ";"\)[10].Trim\(\) -ne "0" } | Measure-Object\).Count; Write-Output "Com VL_SP != 0: $sp | Com VL_SH != 0: $sh")

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Temp\\tu_procedimento.txt"\); $sample = $bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { "{0:X2}" -f $_ }; Write-Output "BOM/header bytes: $\($sample -join ' '\)"; $enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::GetEncoding\(1252\); $line5 = \($enc.GetString\($bytes\) -split "`n"\)[4]; Write-Output "Line5 CP1252: $line5")

PowerShell(cd E:\\xampp\\htdocs\\consultasia && php artisan optimize:clear 2>&1 && php -r "require 'vendor/autoload.php'; \\$app = require 'bootstrap/app.php'; echo 'OK';" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
